subcodes.first_line: O esteemed companion of the honoured Luminary, a special letter was requested for that cherished handmaiden of the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضجیع حضرت منیر قرین محترم نامه ای مخصوص بجهت آن کنیز عزیز اسم اعظم خواست
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
